title: WhiteHat Jr is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: WhiteHat Jr is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? WhiteHat Jr in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About WhiteHat Jr:
WhiteHat Jr is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WhiteHat Jr!
